title: Medical Imaging Techniques Mission and Vision
content:
Medical Imaging Techniques Mission and Vision

Mission:

Üsküdar University Vocational School of Health Services / Medical Imaging Techniques program aims to train students with the following features: Using technological devices, tools and equipment for radiological imaging, applying current techniques and applying them, giving importance to human health and ethical values.

Vision:

Üsküdar University Health Services Vocational High School / Medical Imaging Techniques program is to ensure that prestigious, qualified individuals who have gained international knowledge in the field of Radiological Imaging and preferred in employment in the public and private sectors are brought into the business life.
